notes: BIML's published machine-learning security research artifacts — enumerated architectural risk analyses. See the organization record secid:entity/berryvilleiml.com.

data.official_name: An Architectural Risk Analysis of Machine Learning Systems: Toward More Secure Machine Learning
data.description: 2020 taxonomy of 78 machine-learning security risks organized across 9 components of a generic ML system.
data.notes: Commonly referred to as BIML-78 for its 78 enumerated risks.
